case_title: ST. JOHN, RICHARD vs. STEWART, GEORGIA, AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ST. JOHN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, GEORGIA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HOME FOR CHRISTMAS/SEASONS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART, GEORGIA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HOME FOR CHRISTMAS/SEASONS $1,104.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,187.00
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEES. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ST. JOHN, RICHARD
